provenance.upstream_resampling: Saved surface mesh converted to a level set at the teaching grid spacing
provenance.stochastic_robustness: single saved seed; repeatability not established

studies.title: Mask opening results
studies.scope: Ideal mask-geometry sweep; no exposure or develop model.

studies.title: Dry-etch cycle teaching study
studies.scope: Failing 2D cycle study. This is not the selected traveler.
studies.starts_from: Fresh target-width mask. Cycle 0 follows the opening etch.

studies.title: Liner deposition results
studies.scope: Shows how particle sticking changes wall coverage. Coefficients are uncalibrated.
studies.starts_from: Focused saved etch profile, resampled on the teaching grid.

studies.title: Barrier deposition results
studies.starts_from: Resampled focused etch profile with a fixed liner.

studies.title: Seed deposition results
studies.scope: Directional-versus-isotropic geometry control. No seed limit is declared.
studies.starts_from: Resampled focused etch profile with fixed liner and barrier layers.

studies.title: CMP removal results
studies.scope: Material-selective removal control; no pad pressure or calibrated polish time.
studies.starts_from: Analytic stack with a raised copper plug.

failure_chain.title: Geometry-only handoff chain
failure_chain.scope: Every frame comes from the same simulated geometry lineage.
failure_chain.guardrail: The geometric fill control carries the shape forward but does not use electrical seed continuity. This reproduces geometry propagation, not fab causality.

frames.outcome: Opening starts at the target width.
Depth passes. Width and bow miss.
The layer stays connected but deep coverage misses.
The lower-wall barrier is not connected.
The lower-wall seed is not connected.
The geometric fill control traps a void. It continues even though the seed check failed.
